pricingIntro: Choose a pricing provider if you want live quotes. Spectra requests batched prices from the selected provider and falls back to built-in reference prices when live data is unavailable.
fiatRateProviderNote: Used for USD to local fiat conversion. Default is Open ER.
coinGeckoNote: Optional. Spectra can use CoinGecko pricing with or without a key. If live quotes are unavailable, Spectra uses built-in reference prices.
publicProviderNote: This provider uses public batched quote endpoints. No API key is required in this build.
aboutSubtitle: A self-custodial multi-chain wallet focused on local control, transparent network access, and minimal trust assumptions.
aboutEthosLines: We don't have servers to process your data.
You are in charge of your own keys.
aboutNarrativeParagraphs: Your wallet data stays on your device unless you explicitly choose to share it. Spectra is designed so key material, watched addresses, and local transaction state remain under your control.

You keep control over recovery phrases and private keys at all times. The app is a client, not a custodian, and it should be understood as local wallet software that talks to chain infrastructure rather than a hosted account platform.
reportProblemDescription: Use this page to open the future support form or issue tracker. The link below is a placeholder for now.
buyProvidersIntro: These are official on-ramp providers that support paying with real cash or linked bank/card funding and sending crypto directly to a wallet address. Availability, fees, identity checks, supported networks, and state coverage vary by provider.
buyWarning: Spectra does not process purchases. Always double-check the wallet address, selected chain, and asset before paying, because crypto transfers are typically irreversible.
